Things are starting with Jackery’s Explorer 5000 Plus Portable Power Station at $2,799 shipped, which drops from $2,999 to this price in your cart, and is currently out of stock at Amazon. This flash period is bringing the costs down from the full $4,299 rate, which is the best deal we’ve seen yet in 2026 and the lowest price we have tracked directly from the brand’s website or at Amazon. While there was a short-term exclusive deal to $2,399 that we secured from Wellbots back in December, this flash sale is giving you a window to score it at the next-best price, complete with $1,500 savings. Head below to learn more about this model and browse the other flash offers while they last. You can also shop the full Tax Season Sale on the main landing page here.

items.title: This 49-inch 240Hz DQHD Acer ultrawide gaming monitor undercuts Samsung’s Odyssey down at $600 today
items.summary:
We are now tracking a deal at Amazon that drops Acer’s 49-inch ultrawide DQHD 240Hz gaming monitor down to $599.99 shipped. We’ve spotted this monitor under different listings a few times now, and this appears to be a refreshed version that recently landed on Amazon at $800. You’ll find similar third-party listings on Best Buy and Newegg still hovering at that price, which makes it an easy recommendation at Amazon’s discounted $600 price today. Not only is this is the lowest price we have tracked for this particular model, but it’s one of the lowest prices we’ve ever tracked for a DQHD ultrawide monitor of this size. It undercuts some premium models from the likes of Samsung, GIGABYTE, and so on, and it’s definitely worth a look if you’re in the market for a new gaming monitor to upgrade your battlestation.
